name: Default-Response-Syslog: Offense SYSLOG Sender
notes: Reports any offense matching the severity, credibility, or relevance minimums to syslog.
conditions_text: where the offense severity is greater than 5
where the offense Credibility is greater than 5
where the offense Relevance is greater than 5
TD_list: APPLY Default-Response-Syslog: Offense SYSLOG Sender on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where the offense severity is greater than 5
AND where the offense Credibility is greater than 5
AND where the offense Relevance is greater than 5
